message:
refactor(rch): replace bail! macros with structured error types

Migrated from anyhow::bail! to typed errors for better diagnostics:

commands/mod.rs:
- SSH command failures now return SshError::CommandFailed with
  host, message, and suggestion fields
- speedscore argument validation uses ConfigError::InvalidValue
  with field, reason, suggestion for actionable error messages
- Removed unused WorkerError import

status_display.rs:
- drain_worker, enable_worker, cancel_build return DaemonError::ProtocolError
  instead of bail! for daemon communication failures

transfer.rs:
- rsync sync and artifact retrieval failures return TransferError::SyncFailed
  with reason, exit_code, stderr fields for structured error handling
- Removed bail import, added TransferError import

This enables programmatic error handling and improves user-facing
error messages with specific suggestions for resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
